remarks: Located on 1.34 picturesque acres in New Canaan's historic Silvermine neighborhood, this well-maintained 5-bedroom Colonial combines timeless appeal, a peaceful setting, and plenty of room both inside and out. The expansive 4,194-square-foot floor plan offers great flow and flexible living spaces to accommodate today's lifestyle. The main level features an eat-in kitchen, formal living and dining rooms, a family room, home office, and mudroom with laundry. The second floor includes four bedrooms and a walk-up attic, along with a bonus fifth bedroom located above the garage with its own en-suite bath, providing the perfect setup for an au pair, in-laws, or guests. The lower level provides additional versatile space, including a second family room, office, and gym. The beautiful property offers room for outdoor entertaining, gardening, play, or simply enjoying the peaceful surroundings from the charming gazebo. Ideally situated with easy access to downtown New Canaan, neighboring towns, and commuting routes, this home enjoys the charm and ambiance of the Silvermine community, with close proximity to GrayBarns, the Silvermine Market, and the Silvermine Arts Center, as well as the convenience of nearby amenities in one of New Canaan's most desirable settings.
